job_title: Sr. Software Engineer (Expert Proficiency in NestJS & React Required)
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Frontend Software Engineer
must_have_quals: 3+ years of concentrated, daily experience with NestJS, ability to jump in and contribute day 1, 3+ years of concentrated daily experience with React (Typescript + Javascript) and Vite, Web Services/API experience (.Net Core), Experience with Microservices (.Net Core), Knowledge of Azure CI/CD pipelines, Strong database skills (MS SQL), Experience with JQuery and legacy Webforms (.Net 4.8), Familiarity with AI tooling for DevEx, Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent experience), 3–5+ years of experience in full stack development (or equivalent experience demonstrating strong skills in the required technologies)
core_responsibilities: Be an essential contributor to the engineering team and team culture, Take full ownership of major features from inception to production, Lead initiatives independently while leveraging support from the team, Analyze, troubleshoot, and fix bugs efficiently, Collaborate across departments to ensure the product meets user needs
job_summary: Fullsteam is a leading provider of vertical software and embedded payments technology dedicated to helping businesses flourish. They are seeking a confident Sr. Software Engineer to join their engineering team, where the individual will take ownership of major features, contribute to product strategy, and help shape the engineering culture.
